## Checklist

### General

- [ ] My code follows the conventions in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have run `pnpm build` locally and it passes
- [ ] I have run `pnpm lint` locally and it passes
- [ ] I have run `pnpm typecheck` locally and it passes
- [ ] I have added/updated documentation as needed

### If this is a new feature example

- [ ] Spec is complete with user stories, acceptance criteria, and edge cases
- [ ] Prompt pack is numbered and includes context, steps, and verification
- [ ] Review notes document what the AI got wrong and how it was corrected
- [ ] Feature table in README.md is updated
- [ ] Implementation builds and runs without errors

### Production review (for UI changes)

- [ ] Accessibility: ARIA labels, keyboard navigation, focus management
- [ ] States: Loading, empty, error, and success states are handled
- [ ] Types: Strict TypeScript with no `any` usage
- [ ] Responsive: Tested at mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints
- [ ] Forms: Validation, disabled states during submission, error display

See [docs/production-review-rubric.md](../docs/production-review-rubric.md) for the full checklist.
